name: POLICY-BACKLOG-11
title: test-backlog003.py references BACKLOG-003 without traceability or end-of-life criterion
description: test-backlog003.py refers to 'BACKLOG-003' in its filename and comment. The current bug/backlog scheme uses POLICY-BACKLOG-N — there is no BACKLOG-003 anywhere in rabbit/features/policy/backlogs/. This is a stale historical reference. Per philosophy.md Designed Deprecation, the test should either: (a) be renamed to reference the current canonical ID system, (b) add a comment naming what its assertions guard and when they can be retired, or (c) be merged into test-rule-files-content.py. Location: .claude/features/policy/test/test-backlog003.py lines 1-4.
